text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I've come to the training track.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right, I feel great! The next race will<n>spell a
mighty victory for Teio for<n>sure!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's not even race day, yet you<n>already feel
victorious? Curious.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Prez! You know it! I won't settle<n>for anything
less than total<n>domination!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
After all, my dream is to be the<n>number one
Umamusume that<n>everyone cheers for...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Which means there's no way I can<n>afford to lose
now!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A courageous venture. Your warrior's<n>spirit is a
powerful weapon. I'm sure<n>you will do
splendidly.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. Glad to have your seal of<n>approval!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Be that as it may, do not forget about<n>the concert.
It is important you show<n>your gratitude to your
fans and—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! The concert! I totally forgot<n>about it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll be doing my famous Teio Step<n>center stage!
You better be in the<n>audience!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No one will be able to keep their eyes<n>off me
dancing in my signature<n>racewear! I can't wait! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: So, I've gotta keep practicin'! See ya<n>later, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get a chance to tell her not to<n>get ahead
of herself and slack off on<n>her lessons...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Goodness. She won't stay calm for<n>even a
second.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf seems both flustered<n>yet
impressed by Tokai Teio's<n>impulsiveness.
